headline: Does Shareholder Pressure On Filter Waste Reporting Reveal A Deeper ESG Risk Question For PM?
summary: In late March 2026, Philip Morris International acknowledged a shareholder proposal from As You Sow urging a public report on the reputational, financial, and operational risks of not assuming responsibility for tobacco filter cleanup and the potential benefits of supporting extended producer responsibility laws, while recommending investors vote against it at the upcoming May 6, 2026 annual meeting. This push for detailed analysis of filter-related environmental liabilities highlights...

headline: A Look At Philip Morris International (PM) Valuation After Regulatory Setback In Smoke Free Markets
summary: Philip Morris International (PM) has been under pressure after FDA regulatory action and new tax and product rules in Japan and France, which have introduced near term uncertainty for its smoke free growth story. See our latest analysis for Philip Morris International. The recent regulatory hit that knocked roughly 6% off the share price is being reflected in a 30 day share price return of 11.14% and a year to date share price return decline of 1.37%, while the 5 year total shareholder return...
